verses.text: Tu-in Levi' suante khat in Levi numei khat mah zi-in la hi
Tua numei gai-in tapa khat nei a, nau hoih khat hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, kha thum sung a seel hi

Amah in naungek a seel zawh nawnloh ciangin ama-a' dingin pumpeeng tawh kibawl lawh khat phansak a, tua lawh pen buan leh kultal tui tawh a zut hi. Tua sungah naungek sialin gun gei-a phaikungte lakah a koih hi
Amah bang a kicih hiam cih a thei dingin a gamla panin mun khatah a sanggamnu a ding hi
Tu-in Faro' tanu a kisil dingin gunah hong pai a, a nasem numeite gun gei-ah a vak lai takun amah in phaikungte lakah a lawh mu a, tua lawh a la dingin a nasem numei khat a sawl hi
Amah in a hon' ciangin naungek mu hi. Naungek kap ahih manin tuanu in hehpihhuai sa a, “Hih naungek, Hebru mite' ta khat ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a sanggamnu in Faro tanu kiangah, “Keimah pai-in Hebru numeite lak panin nang-a' dingin naupang hong khoisak dingin naucing khat ka va sapsak ding hiam?” va ci hi
Faro' tanu in ama kiangah, “Va pai in,” na ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin numeino pai-in naupang' nu va sam hi
Faro' tanu in ama kiangah, “Hih naupang la in la, kei-a' dingin hong khoisak in; na thaman kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupi in naupang la-in a khoi hi
Naupang khang a, amah in Faro tanu' kiangah paipih a, amah pen tuanu' tapa a suak hi. Amah in a min Moses a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Tui sung panin amah ka kai khia hi,” a ci hi.
Ni khat, Moses a khan' khit ciangin, ama mipihte kiangah pai-in amau' gimnate va mu hi. Egypt mi khat in ama mipih Hebru mi khat a sat zong a mu hi
Amah khuadak kawikawi a, kuamah mulo ahih manin Egypt mipa thatin sehnel sungah a seel hi
A zing ciangin amah paikik a, Hebru mi nih na kilai uh hi. Amah in a gamta khial mipa kiangah, “Bang hangin na lawm sat na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in dawngin, “Kote' tungah ulian ding leh thukhen dingin kua in nang hong koih ahi hiam? Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei thah ding hong sawm na hi hiam?” na ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses lau a, “A thu hong kithei taktak hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi
Faro in tua thu a zak ciangin Moses thah dingin a zong hi. Ahih hangin Faro kiang panin Moses tai-in Midian gam a tung hi. Nikhat amah tuikhuk gei khatah tu hi
Tua laitakin Midian siampi Jethro in tanu sagih nei hi. Amaute hong pai-in tui tawi uh a, a pa uh' tuuhonte tui pia dingin kuangzawn dim uh hi
Tuucing dangte hong pai-in amaute hawlkhia hi. Ahih hangin Moses dingto-in amaute huh a, a tuuhonte uh tui piaksak hi
A pa uh kiangah amaute a tun' ciangun amah in, “A bangcia tuni-a hong hici ciah baih na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi
Amaute in, “Egypt mi khat in tuucing dangte' khutsung panin kote hong honkhia a, ko-a' dingin tui nangawn hong tawisakin tuuhonte tui pia hi,” ci uh hi
Amah in a tanute kiangah, “Amah koi lai-ah om ahi hiam? Bang hangin tua mipa nusia na hi uh hiam? Amah in an hong nek theihna dingin va sam un,” a ci hi
Moses zong tua mipa kiangah om ding lungkim a, amah in Moses tungah a tanu Zipporah a pia hi
Tuanu in tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Gershom a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Tua zawh kum tampi khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa si hi. Israel mite a salsuahna sung uhah amau' kikona Pasian kiang tung hi
Pasian in amau' thumna za hi. Pasian in Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tawh a thuciamna a phawk hi
Pasian in Israel mite mu a, amaute' omzia zong a thei hi.
